programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Joining James at his home in the Hampshire countryside this time are singer-songwriter Jack Savoretti and chefs Asma Khan, Jonny Lake, and Ryan and Liam Simpson-Trotman.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: In Donegal Town, Dermot's journey takes him further south along the Wild Atlantic Way, discovering a place where Irish tradition and global flavours sit side by side. His day begins at family-run Hannah Hats, where he's fitted in iconic Donegal tweed and learns why this rugged corner of Ireland became famous for its beautifully flecked fabric. Dressed fit for a fine meal, Dermot visits one of Ireland's most unexpected culinary hotspots: Chandpur, widely regarded as Ireland's best curry house. He meets Bangladeshi-born chef Rana, and together they cook railway curry using outstanding local Donegal lamb and potatoes - it's a heaven-made match of Asian flavours and quality Irish produce. For pudding, Dermot meets chef Brian McDermott, one of the biggest champions of Donegal's food scene. Together they bake a classic Irish apple pie, with Brian revealing why all the local rain creates richer grass, creamier milk and extra buttery pastry, making Donegal Town a dessert destination.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: In Donegal Town, Dermot's journey takes him further south along the Wild Atlantic Way, discovering a place where Irish tradition and global flavours sit side by side. His day begins at family-run Hannah Hats, where he's fitted in iconic Donegal tweed and learns why this rugged corner of Ireland became famous for its beautifully flecked fabric. Dressed fit for a fine meal, Dermot visits one of Ireland's most unexpected culinary hotspots: Chandpur, widely regarded as Ireland's best curry house. He meets Bangladeshi-born chef Rana, and together they cook railway curry using outstanding local Donegal lamb and potatoes - it's a heaven-made match of Asian flavours and quality Irish produce. programme.title: Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue is joined by old friend Raymond Blanc as he cooks a chocolate mousse - he calls it 'Maman Blanc' as it's a recipe that came from his mother. It's also a cheesecake day for Prue as she makes a Basque burnt cheesecake and a no-bake lemon and ginger cheesecake. Prue's food hero this time is Bold Beans and a farmer who produces some of the peas for the company - Prue and John then use some of those peas to make Indian pancakes with a carlin pea saag and paneer, and John is very happy that Prue has saved him some cheesecake and some of Raymond's chocolate mousse! While John heads to Tewkesbury to meet a woman who has revived an old tradition for making mustard balls, Prue has hacks for a mouthwatering burger sauce and a quick and healthy lunch using tinned sardines.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The annual Thassingham Classical Music Festival draws in big audiences as several musicians anxiously compete for the coveted Falconer Bursary Award - shockwaves rocket though it when Jacob Wheeler is awarded the prize instead of the supremely talented Zac Sowande, but shock soon turns to horror when Jacob is found murdered strangled by violin string. Barnaby's initial investigations begin by focusing on Jacob's fellow musicians and their charismatic maestro Michael Falconer, who is using the festival to debut his Ninth Symphony while simultaneously belittling his own musician son Dan - when Barnaby realises that Jacob's Stradivarius is missing and that Jacob might not have been the completely dedicated musician his sister Natalie claims him to be, his subsequent investigations lead them deep into a world that is haunted by a potentially deadly curse.

programme.title: The Essex Millionaire Murders
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part documentary series. Detectives raid Luke D'Wit's home and seize a huge stash of prescription drugs - including fentanyl and antihistamine - that are both found in the Baxters' postmortem as police press Luke to explain his relationship to Carol Baxter's mysterious American physician Dr Andrea Bowden. Luke has been mixing 'medicinal' drinks for Carol on Dr Bowden's instructions, but detectives can find no trace of her existence - meanwhile, Ellena Baxter is completely cleared of her parents' murders and agrees to be interviewed as a witness for the police. As Ellena slowly realises that Luke has been a cuckoo in the family nest, detectives spend months combing through D'Wit's multiple digital devices to piece together the scale of his deception and cruelty.

programme.title: TikTok: Murder Gone Viral
programme.desc: With exclusive access to the victims' families, friends and the police, this documentary strand explores extraordinary true crime cases linked to the world's fastest-growing social media platform. Raheel Ahmad looked the perfect match for TikTok photographer Sania Khan on paper - he came from a good family and wanted to be a doctor, but Raheel couldn't pass his medical exams once the couple had gotten married and then tried to hurl himself and her from the window of their 28th-storey Chicago apartment just months after their huge wedding. Hospitalised with mental problems, Raheel admitted that he had lied about his age and had been unfaithful - Sania then went public on TikTok with her agonies over whether to stick by her man or request a divorce. Her honesty and growing self-reliance resonated with abused women around the world and sent shockwaves through the South Asian community in America - the couple separated, but Raheel started to plot his revenge as Sania's posts went viral.

programme.title: Syd
programme.desc: Syd is the inspirational story of a man who never backed down from a challenge. As a cricketer, David 'Syd' Lawrence was a fearsome fast bowler, who reached the top of the game to become the first British-born Black player to represent England. Although his career was cut short by an injury, described as one of the worst in sporting history, his achievements off the field have to be seen to be believed. In this film by Sabet Choudhury, Syd's family and friends including Phil Tufnell, Jonathan Agnew, Jack Russell and Sir Viv Richards recount a story that shows what can be achieved with a strong will and pure determination.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Mother-and-son duo Paul and Catharine are overwhelmed by Paul's multi-level backyard while Paul also finds his current indoor fitness regime frustrating - Brian and Sarah muscle up to the challenge of building a gym in Paul's backyard while also building a hot tub and a beer tap to help him cool down after a big workout.

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: 21-year-old skater boy Seb from Birmingham is looking for love - he's got three single girls shopping in Manchester for him. The twist is that he doesn't get to see the girls and has to judge them entirely based on the outfits they pick him - whoever best hits his brief will win a date! Dancer Grace, barber Ella, and make-up student Hope are battling it out for Seb's affections, but who will Dress to Impress?

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: The show where people hope to find true love through their love of food - one lucky celebrity gets the chance to find romance as they enjoy three very special meals cooked for them by three very special blind dates. In this episode, Real Housewives of Cheshire star Ester Dee is going to be given five menus, each of which has been put together by a potential blind date - the five men behind the menus have all come up with a three-course meal, but Ester will only be having dinner with three of them. Ester will choose her dates based on the menus that she most likes the look of, but who will she want to see for seconds when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama about a detective whose patch is a seemingly idyllic rural district. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. Long-buried secrets and sinister pasts are unearthed when the naked body of a young woman is found strangled in local woodland nine years after three identical - and still unsolved murders - took place there. As DCI Barnaby and DS Troy dig deeper into the clandestine world of Midsomer Worthy, they soon find themselves embroiled in a dark web of deceit, violence, and mystery.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. The sleepy village of Martyr Warren is invaded by quarrelsome New Age travellers, some of whom fall out with local magistrate Hector Bridges - the police are well aware of the tensions, but matters come to a head when Hector is found shot dead. It quickly appears that he was feared by almost everyone in sight - including his own family - and there is more to the travellers than meets the eye as one of them is a former British Army officer who fought alongside Hector in the Falklands War... Meanwhile, Barnaby is not feeling in full fighting trim for murder investigations as Joyce has put him on a strict diet to lose weight.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama about a detective whose patch is a seemingly idyllic rural district. When a local tramp is found murdered in the woods following a hunt meet, a local poacher is arrested and jailed - however, the young lad's father is then also brutally murdered and the killer attempts to pass it off as suicide. DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Troy realise that there is much more to this case than first appears as hidden within the hunt community are complex relationships, multiple lies, and incestuous pasts. With the hunt season in full swing, it is only a matter of time before someone else is savagely killed...

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama based on the novel of the same name by Ann Cleeves. Vera and the team investigate the case of a murdered social worker called Jenny Lister, a woman who was universally considered to have been principled and popular - in an overworked and understaffed social work system, a notorious case involving the death of a child seems to hold the key to solving the killing. Vera uses her innate empathy and intuition to pursue the truth behind the murder - when she discovers the real secret at the heart of Jenny's death, the killer will stop at nothing to keep it hidden.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: When Morse investigates the death of a young secretary whose body is found in a pub car park, his enquiries lead him to a local insurance office where a web of passion and corruption is soon uncovered.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: On learning that an acquaintance who claimed to have knowledge of several unreported murders in her village has died in a tragic accident, Miss Marple visits the village of Wychwood-under-Ashe. She charms her way into village life and befriends Luke Fitzwilliam, a handsome former policeman who is increasingly drawn to a new arrival, the mysterious and beautiful young American Bridget Conway. When the sudden deaths of the belligerent local GP Dr Humbleby and Honoria Waynflete's maid leave Reverend Wake busy with funeral services, Luke finds himself becoming Miss Marple's confidante and ally in the search for the truth. Before long the bereaved Jessie Humbleby loses her grip on reality, and Constable Reed turns to Miss Marple for guidance in the murky waters of his first murder case. Investigations continue until Miss Marple unearths a secret so shocking that the village will never be the same again.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama. It's the summer of 1971, and Endeavour and the team are called to investigate the murder of a cab driver found dead in his taxi on the outskirts of Oxford - with a recent string of assaults on cab drivers, the team worry that assault has escalated to murder and that the population of Oxfordshire is at this killer's mercy. Meanwhile, Endeavour receives a guest at home who reminds him of a past he'd sooner forget, and as the investigation into the cab driver's murder unfolds, Endeavour finds that the case is hitting too close to home. He then starts to retreat from those close to him - and appears set on a course of wilful self-destruction.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective drama. The residents of Midsomer Mallow fear that their chances of winning a perfect village competition have been dashed when a local petty thief is stabbed to death with a pitchfork - things start to spiral out of control when two of the judges for the competition are then also brutally murdered. Can DCI Barnaby and DS Troy track down the murderer before more innocent people are killed?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama about a detective whose patch is a seemingly idyllic rural district. Few people in the village of Aspern Tallow believe that the ghost of Jonathan Lowrie actually exists... until they hear the distant tolling of church bells, witness the spontaneous combustion of packing cases, and find the battered body of Jonathan's distant relative dumped in his ancestor's grave. It is down to DCI Barnaby and DS Troy to decide whether such goings-on are the work of the supernatural or some other evil force...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two couples disappear from the tiny village of Monks Barton leaving their half-eaten breakfasts on their tables - Barton Woods is said to be haunted and pompous cleric the Reverend Wallace Stone tells Barnaby that the monastery was destroyed in the 16th century. When psychic Cyrus LeVanu conducts spiritual healing in the woods and unearths a man's body to his horror, can Barnaby and Jones discover the secret of Barton Woods and find the killer amid rumours of witchcraft and an antiques racket?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the murder of 29-year-old Niall Coulter - with those closest to Niall intent upon obscuring the truth, it is not until the body of a drug dealer is found washed up on a Northumberland beach that the dreadful truth begins to emerge about Niall's past. While coping with revelations from her own past, Vera sifts through evidence of the grief, love and addiction that characterised Niall's life and deduces that his murderer acted through selfless and unrequited love.

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: The first episode of a drama based on real events. Working-class Jane Andrews wants more for her life and is unlucky in love - on the brink of losing all hope, Jane receives a letter inviting her to interview for a job with Sarah, the Duchess of York at Buckingham Palace. Securing the job, she moves to London - however, life in the palace is gruelling and Jane struggles to fit in. When Jane and Sarah begin to form a close bond, will this be enough to secure Jane a spot in Sarah's inner circle?

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: Drama based on real events. Jane and the Duchess grow ever closer as both experience break-ups at the same time - immersed in a new circle of London's elite, Jane meets dashing businessman Luis and the two begin a relationship, but tensions with Luis soon erupt on a holiday in Greece and Jane becomes increasingly unstable. As Jane's carefully constructed composure starts to fracture and puts her position with the Duchess at risk, could businessman Tommy Cressman prove to be her happy ending?

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: This series evokes the mood of the swinging '60s in a peaceful countryside setting - based on the Constable books by Nicholas Rhea, the programme combines humour, drama, and compelling characters. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. DCI Barnaby uncovers a seedy world of adultery and deceit within an affluent rural community when the body of arrogant local beauty Melissa Townsend is discovered by the pool at her manor house.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a former footballer is beaten to death on a London street in what looks like a robbery gone wrong, investigations lead Ronnie and Matt to Mike Jones. He was seen in the area at the time of the murder, has motive and is linked to the murder weapon. Protesting his innocence, Mike points the finger at a well-known East End gangster who he claims he saw at the scene of the crime. At the trial James Steel is up against eccentric defence barrister Jason Peters. Witness intimidation, false plea bargaining and corruption stand in the way of the truth but in the end, will the decency of one good Samaritan be enough to finally put the murderer away?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When High Court judge Rachel Callaghan is shot and critically injured in an underground car park, the signs point to the job being done by a hitman. But who wanted the judge dead - a notorious criminal or someone a little closer to home? As evidence begins to mount against the prime suspect, Callaghan's health deteriorates and she decides to stop her hospital treatment - a step which would lead to her death. George Castle is torn between friendship and his respect for a person's right to die, as he tries to get Callaghan to accept the truth of what has happened.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: The first episode of a drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. Spithead, Portsmouth, 1793 - a storm is raging in the English Channel and a small shore boat is being lashed by squally rain as two oarswomen battle against the waves. Huddled at the stern is a pale-faced 17-year-old making his maiden voyage to a career in the Royal Navy - soaked to the skin in his ill-fitting uniform, doctor's son Horatio Hornblower steps aboard his first ship, the HMS Justinian. This shy and stuttering seaman is set to become the most gallant and redoubtable figure in naval history, but his peers are wary of his intelligence and malicious Midshipman Jack Simpson adds the new recruit to his list of targets - when Simpson accuses Hornblower of cheating at cards, Hornblower snaps and challenges Simpson to a duel to settle their differences once and for all. The other men think Horatio is mad, but they also think they know that Simpson is the best shot in the navy...

programme.title: Marc Márquez: Everything red!

programme.title: MotoGP - Czech GP
programme.desc: The Motorcycle World Championship returns to one of the most emblematic circuits on the calendar, Brno, where it has not been raced since 2020. And it does so just before the summer break in the competition. The route, with 14 curves, puts both driver and machine to the limit.

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara

programme.title: Brata S2

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans

programme.title: Signal

programme.desc: From 2024. Donald Trump started his real estate business in 1970s and 80s New York with the help of infamous lawyer Roy Cohn. Determined to step out of his father's shadow, the young Trump met Cohn, who became an important figure in his life.

programme.title: The girl who played with fire
programme.desc: From 2009. Mikael Blomkvist is working on a major article about sex trafficking when two of his colleagues are brutally killed. But Blomkvist is only shocked when it turns out that the main suspect is Lisbeth Salander!

programme.title: Edge of Darkness
programme.desc: From 2010. Thomas Craven is a Boston Police Department homicide detective and single father. When his only child is murdered on the doorstep of his own home, everyone is convinced that it is Thomas himself who was the target of the murder.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: From 2012. Marty is a failed screenwriter who dreams of completing a screenplay he calls Seven Psychopaths. Billy is Marty's best friend, an unemployed actor and part-time dog thief who wants to help Marty in any way possible.

programme.title: Delivery Man
programme.desc: From 2013. 20 years ago, David donated sperm, and unfortunately there was a slight mix-up at the sperm clinic. David is now the biological father of 533 children who would like to have contact!

programme.title: Made in Italy
programme.desc: From 2020. Robert and his son have drifted apart, but return to Tuscany together to sell the villa left to them by Robert's late wife.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: From 2015. Today almost ten thousand visitors flock to Jurassic World, but behind the park's many attractions something sinister is hiding: a genetically modified dinosaur with brutal abilities.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: From 2018. When the dinosaur island of Isla Nublar's dormant volcano comes to life, Owen and Claire must save the last surviving dinosaurs - before they are completely wiped out.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: From 1982. A lost little extraterrestrial creature, three million light years from home. A lonely ten-year-old boy who takes him home. Two lives that are changed by a timeless experience and a friendship without earthly boundaries.

programme.title: The 40 Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: From 2005. 40-year-old Andy Stizer has a comfortable job at an electrical department store and a pleasant apartment with a classy collection of action figures. But there is one thing he has been unable to do but to.

programme.title: Emma.
programme.desc: From 2020. England in the 19th century. Emma is a restless young lady who must go through several deceptive dates and romantic missteps to find love, which turns out to have been there all along.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: From 1986. Together with his navigator Goose, Pete 'Maverick' Mitchell is admitted to the Navy's famous elite school for would-be attack pilots; Top Gun.

programme.title: Sicario
programme.desc: From 2015. When an idealistic FBI agent is recruited by the head of an investigative team looking for a drug lord, she embarks on a dangerous mission that forces her to question everything she believes in.

programme.title: Heretic
programme.desc: From 2024. The two young missionaries Sister Barnes and Sister Paxton knock on the door of the eccentric Mr. Reed. He warmly welcomes them in, but it soon dawns on them that this blueberry pie-scented home is not quite what it first appears…

programme.title: Explosive bomb
programme.desc: From 2006. After being released from prison, Tonny goes to the movies with his children, but is furious when the movie does not live up to his expectations. Then something happens that brings him himself into the world of the film.

programme.title: In love with New York
programme.desc: From 2013. Gretta and her boyfriend Dave share a passion for music. They have been lovers since college, wrote songs together, now live together and newly moved to New York City.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: From 1999. For large parts of his life, Sonny has avoided taking any kind of responsibility. When his girlfriend leaves him for a much older man, Sonny decides to prove that he is indeed ready to grow up.

programme.title: Two Night Stand
programme.desc: From 2014. Sometimes you just need a one night stand. And just as often you need to get out the door quickly afterwards! But what if a snowstorm blocks all escape routes and makes the walk of shame impossible?

programme.title: The Bling Ring
programme.desc: From 2013. A group of teenagers, obsessed with fashion and fame, break into the homes of famous people in Hollywood.

programme.title: The Outrun
programme.desc: From 2024. After ten years in London, 29-year-old Rona goes home to the Orkney Islands in Scotland. Sober but lonely, she tries to repress the memories of the events that set off her detox journey.

programme.title: Journal 64
programme.desc: From 2018. Behind a false wall in the apartment, three mummified corpses sit around a dining table. Carl Mørck and his assistant Assad in the police Department Q are assigned to find out who the mummies are.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 1
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 2
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Oblivion

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Oblivion

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 1
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire, Pt 1
programme.desc: Ledakan gunung berapi memicu serangkaian peristiwa dahsyat serupa dalam efek domino yang mengancam akan memusnahkan planet ini kecuali jika satu orang dapat menghentikannya tepat waktu.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire Part 2
programme.desc: An oil rig triggers a volcanic eruption, kick starting a cataclysmic series along the Ring of Fire. If the eruptions aren't stopped, Earth faces an extinction-level event.

programme.title: Ring Of Fire, Pt 2
programme.desc: Para penyintas bersatu menghadapi bencana besar. AERA melancarkan misi bom sonar ke kawah gunung, sementara berbagai kelompok berjuang menyelamatkan diri dan mengevakuasi anak-anak yang terjebak.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Seorang peternak kecil setuju untuk menahan seorang penjahat yang tertangkap, yang sedang menunggu kereta untuk pergi ke pengadilan di Yuma. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi saat penjahat itu mencoba mengelabui peternak tersebut.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 2
programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Lost In Translation
programme.desc: Seorang bintang film yang redup dan seorang wanita muda yang terabaikan membentuk ikatan yang tak terduga setelah bertemu di Tokyo.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Mengisahkan bagaimana ambisi buta, gairah membara, dan keserakahan tingkat tinggi menggulingkan kerajaan kasino Las Vegas.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: Peter berlibur ke Hawaii untuk mengatasi putus cinta baru-baru ini dengan pacarnya, Sarah. Tanpa disadarinya, Sarah juga pergi ke resor yang sama dan membawa serta pacar barunya.

programme.title: Jurassic World Rebirth: The Making Of A New Era
programme.desc: Jelajahi tempat paling berbahaya di Bumi dalam tayangan spesial ini yang akan membawa Anda ke balik layar JURASSIC WORLD REBIRTH

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: Seorang prajurit bayaran bangkit melawan raja tiran yang kejam demi menyatukan suku-suku gurun dan menjadi penguasa legendaris.

programme.title: The Scorpion King 2: Rise of a Warrior
programme.desc: Mathayus muda memulai perjalanan balas dendam terhadap raja terkutuk yang membunuh ayahnya demi mendapatkan pedang kekuatan.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Seorang musisi yang sedang berjuang menyadari bahwa dia adalah satu-satunya orang di Bumi yang dapat mengingat The Beatles setelah bangun di realitas alternatif di mana mereka tidak pernah ada.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Seorang detektif tangguh menyamar sebagai guru TK untuk melacak seorang pengedar narkoba berbahaya melalui anaknya.

programme.title: Sgt. Bilko
programme.desc: Steve Martin dan Dan Aykroyd membintangi komedi liar ini tentang pemimpin yang keterlaluan dari sekelompok tentara yang merancang rencana untuk menyelamatkan pangkalan mereka ketika terancam ditutup.

programme.title: The Secret Life Of Pets
programme.desc: Dua anjing rumahan yang saling bermusuhan tersesat di jalanan New York. Mereka terpaksa bekerja sama untuk menggagalkan rencana pasukan hewan telantar yang ingin balas dendam pada manusia.

programme.title: The Secret Life Of Pets 2
programme.desc: Melanjutkan kisah Max dan teman-teman hewan peliharaannya, mengikuti kehidupan rahasia mereka setelah pemilik mereka meninggalkan mereka untuk bekerja atau sekolah setiap hari.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Pengusaha yang kalem, Sandy Patterson, melakukan perjalanan dari Denver ke Florida untuk menghadapi wanita yang tampak tidak berbahaya namun telah hidup mewah setelah mencuri identitas Sandy.

programme.title: Snow White and The Huntsman
programme.desc: Dongeng telah berakhir… Dalam film aksi-petualangan epik ini, Kristen Stewart (Twilight) memerankan satu-satunya orang di negeri itu yang lebih adil daripada Ratu Jahat.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: Setelah ayah mereka meninggal, dua saudara kandung kembali ke tanah pertanian keluarga mereka untuk menjualnya. Namun, ada kekuatan gelap yang tersembunyi, yang membuat mereka harus memikirkan kembali hubungan mereka dengan tanah warisan leluhur.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Kehidupan sepuluh orang asing saling bersinggungan melalui serangkaian peristiwa mengerikan ketika jamur yang bermutasi mulai menyebar di sebuah kota kecil dan memusnahkan setiap orang yang bersentuhan dengannya.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts In...
programme.desc: Terinspirasi oleh tokoh legendaris Di Renjie, kisah yang berlatar masa pemerintahan Kaisar Wu ini mengungkap "misteri zombie" di Kota Changle, membongkar rahasia mengejutkan yang melibatkan konspirasi politik.

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Tujuh turis dengan masa lalu yang kelam terjebak di pabrik setan di pedesaan Belanda. Saat mereka diserang satu per satu karena dosa mereka, malam itu menjadi ajang pertarungan untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Model Family, Ep 1
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga dengan orang tua tunggal pindah ke sebuah lingkungan baru yang kehidupan warganya tampak sempurna. Namun, ternyata semuanya tak seperti yang mereka kira.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn
programme.desc: Setelah ayah mereka meninggal, dua saudara kandung kembali ke tanah pertanian keluarga mereka untuk menjualnya. Namun, ada kekuatan gelap yang tersembunyi, yang membuat mereka harus memikirkan kembali hubungan mereka dengan tanah warisan leluhur.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Kehidupan sepuluh orang asing saling bersinggungan melalui serangkaian peristiwa mengerikan ketika jamur yang bermutasi mulai menyebar di sebuah kota kecil dan memusnahkan setiap orang yang bersentuhan dengannya.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts In...
programme.desc: Terinspirasi oleh tokoh legendaris Di Renjie, kisah yang berlatar masa pemerintahan Kaisar Wu ini mengungkap "misteri zombie" di Kota Changle, membongkar rahasia mengejutkan yang melibatkan konspirasi politik.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: Seorang gadis muda bertemu dengan seorang novelis di sebuah bar dan langsung jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, ternyata ia malah terperangkap ke dalam jebakan yang direkayasa oleh si novelis dan mantan kekasihnya.

programme.title: Model Family, Ep 2
programme.desc: Sebuah keluarga dengan orang tua tunggal pindah ke sebuah lingkungan baru yang kehidupan warganya tampak sempurna. Namun, ternyata semuanya tak seperti yang mereka kira.

programme.title: They Wait In The Dark
programme.desc: Amy, seorang wanita muda, tengah melarikan diri bersama putranya, Adrian, dari mantan pacarnya yang kasar. Ketika masa lalu menghantui mereka, mereka harus menghadapi kekuatan yang mengancam mereka, baik dari dalam maupun luar.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: Di sebuah pantai, Evie muda menemukan kalung terkutuk, tanpa sengaja membebaskan iblis air jahat yang berniat mengklaim dirinya dan orang-orang yang dicintainya.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: Jong-Gyu, seorang pengusir setan, melawan monster rubah yang menggoda setelah mereka menghancurkan hidupnya. Didorong oleh amarah, ia berlatih dengan seorang pertapa, menggunakan pedang pembunuh iblis. Perjalanannya mencapai puncaknya dalam pertarungan melawan raja iblis dunia bawah.

programme.desc: Nuan-chan, yang menderita masa lalu yang menyakitkan yang memaksanya untuk melakukan tugas sebagai medium suci di desa yang terpencil.

programme.desc: Digigit kelelawar gila, seorang penyiar radio larut malam meneror rekan-rekan kerjanya saat dia perlahan-lahan berubah menjadi vampir.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman mengadakan pesta di rooftop kampus. Ketika sebuah lelucon membunuh salah satu dari mereka, mereka bersumpah untuk tidak pernah membicarakan apa yang terjadi. Sekarang, mereka dihantui oleh hantunya sementara konsekuensi dari tindakan mereka mengikuti mereka.

programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.sub-title: All-wheel drive fun on and off-road
programme.desc: All-wheel drive is only fun off-road? Absolutely not! And these two are proof: The Subaru Forester is taking off in its new sixth generation. We check its qualities on and off-road and find out the secret of its success. And this all-wheel drive stunner is probably one of the most extraordinary electric cars. Five exciting facts and a bonus about the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N. (channel information) await you.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.desc: The international rally event has been part of the “FIA Marathon Rally Worldcup” since 2017. Previously it was the closing event of the “Middle East Rally Championship”. The record winner is Mohammed bin Sulayem. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Super Seven – when you hear these words, car fans first think of Lotus. Because Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: We're getting to the bottom of the current retro trend: Purist café racers and similarly classic motorcycles in the style of the 50s to 80s are on the rise worldwide. Hollywood star Orlando Bloom had a BMW S 1000 R individually tuned in Los Angeles under the motto New Heritage. Motorcycles is showing its classically styled custom bike and other representatives of the heritage scene at the Concorso d'Eleganza Villa d'Este on Lake Como and at the Wheels And Waves festival in Biarritz. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: After accidents, there are often kilometer-long queues of cars. To get through it, the only thing that helps is patience and anticipation of the vacation. And of course they: the ADAC traffic jam advisors. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Java House Grand Prix of Arlington, Streets of Arlington, Texas

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: “Setra” – this name applies worldwide to buses of the highest quality. One of the largest and most modern bus factories in the world is located here in Neu-Ulm. EvoBus GmbH – a wholly owned subsidiary of Daimler AG – produces transport vehicles on over 700,000 square meters. Well over 3,000 Setra and Mercedes buses leave the production halls every year. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Modern goods logistics! Without them, our everyday digital life would be hard to imagine. We order online every day and at any time. We expect everything to arrive on time - whether it's clothing, a printer spare part or a delivery of screws. But how does it work, smoothly, on time and safely? After all, we live in turbulent times: digitalization, climate crisis, growing global population and politically and economically unstable conditions. How does the logistics industry deal with such challenges? To answer these questions, we have to delve deep into the world of modern goods logistics. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection more than any other vehicle, the international limousines from Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar. They are the crowning achievement of global automotive creation and define the standard of grandiose luxury and elegant comfort. Dream Cars presents the most expensive, luxurious and exclusive limousines in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: When you think of Aston Martin, you automatically think of James Bond and incredibly expensive and sleek sports cars. The British luxury brand also had limousines in its range, such as the Aston Martin Lagonda, which was introduced in 1976. A solvent Aston fan had the V8 sedan extensively converted into a station wagon. Classic Ride presents the Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake and other unique pieces. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: 50 years of the Porsche 911, 60 years of the Chevrolet Corvette: two legends, two myths, two dream cars, and: two philosophies. The Porsche 911 and the Chevrolet Corvette are the sports car icons in Europe and the USA. Both unique, both with a distinctive design, both the epitome of a sports car. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Every day, city dwellers wage a nerve-wracking battle for the last remaining parking space. Not only is the number of vehicles on the roads constantly increasing, but the models are also constantly growing in length and width. The trend towards SUVs puts the crown on this problem. A real war has now broken out between small cars and SUVs. Perfect Ride goes to war for the last gap with the poster child for waste, the BMW X6 and the Smart forfour designed especially for the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Stars, mix of styles and a blunder - today's topics at Tuning: Crazy tour bus: The T4 from Samy Deluxe and his gang gets a new life. Modern style mix: There is nothing original about Markus' Polo anymore. XS threesome with XL performance. The 3 Series Compact from Schnitzer mutates into a sports car horror. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes have set up shop on a huge industrial site. This is the ultimate showdown between an extremely fast stuntman and a no less sporty BMW 3 Series... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Classics on the way to auction
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the vintage car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland. It has been a permanent address for lovers of classic automobiles for over four decades and is known for its regular classic car auctions. Together with auctioneer Serge Stotzer and his team, Martin takes a look behind the scenes of the preparations for the next auction. Some of the vehicles that will go under the hammer on Saturday, March 21st will be presented in more detail - and Martin will also get behind the wheel himself to experience these classics on the road. An exciting preview (channel information).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: What is the essence of sports cars? Perfomance? Precision? Or the incomparable feeling of mastering the road. For example in the McLaren 600 LT: A corner robber with a dynamic that makes car fanatics' hearts beat faster. In the Aston Martin Vantage Roadster, British tradition and power merge to create an irresistible open-air experience. And: Alfa Romeo Giulia GTAm. (Station info).

programme.title: German Rallycross Championship 2024
programme.desc: Eight races on four different routes: The German Rallycross Championship is looking for its new champion for 2024. The drivers fight for the titles in six different classes on rallycross routes in Germany and the Netherlands. Short sprint races take place on tracks with a mix of asphalt and gravel. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT
programme.desc: In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. We show what idea lies behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in the practical test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maschinenfabrik Augsburg-Nürnberg AG. In short MAN. The company has existed for over 250 years. It all started in 1758 with ore mining in Oberhausen. Today the company employs 47,700 people worldwide. The supplier of trucks, buses, turbomachinery, diesel and marine engines now holds leading market positions. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Saving energy is a must, especially in the automotive industry. It's good that the competition is so great. Developments are in full swing and manufacturers present their latest “green” concepts at every motor show. Motorvision TV takes a close look at current developments and takes a wide variety of aspects into account. What's new in engines? (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar F-Type, Aston Martin Vanquish Volante or Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive and, they are fun. English convertibles enjoy cult status all over the world because, after all, the fun of open and fast two-seaters was invented in England. English roadsters offer more sporting spirit than any other, equipped with power, luxury and elegance, they are the most fascinating convertibles of all. Rolls Royce Phantom Drophead, Jaguar F-Type or Aston Martin Vanquish Volante, Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking English convertibles of all time. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: They offer driving fun with a guarantee: classic convertibles with a lot of tinder. This species includes, for example, the Sunbeam Tiger. Under the hood of the compact roadster is a powerful V8 engine from Ford USA. With a heavy foot on the accelerator, the Tiger driver easily draws 20-meter-long lines on the asphalt. Today the Sunbeam Tiger is a cheap alternative to an incredibly expensive Shelby Cobra. Also in the show: A Beetle convertible from 1951 with Porsche power. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: What role will digitalization play in future automobile manufacturing? We at Porsche Digital are looking for answers to this question. Furthermore: a Skoda, of all things, developed into a classic off-road vehicle in New Zealand in the 1960s and 70s. And: the Volkswagen Arteo shooting brake in the test and a trip to the Toyota winter driving school in Saalfelden in the Defender. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Vive la Difference: Always unusual in design, always exceptional in driving comfort, often avant-garde: the Renault brand cars. Renault is making history with the Dauphine, R4, R16 and R5 models. The R4 is the car of the hippies, the R16 is the perfect vehicle for the Francophile father and the R5 is one of the most popular small cars of the 80s. Renault also writes racing and rally history: the victories of the blue flounder, the Renault Alpine, at the Monte Carlo Rally will never be forgotten. Car History shows the history of the French Volkswagen, from the first model through the classics of the 60s, 70s and 80s to (channel info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Dubai – the largest and most important Motor Sow in the Middle East takes place here. The sheikhs have a penchant for fast and exclusive vehicles, so everything that has a reputation in the car world is gathered here. And: Supercars go straight from the stand in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: A small car and a super sports car with the same drive concept? That actually exists. The Porsche GT3 and the Smart both have rear-wheel drive, i.e. the engine in the rear and driven rear wheels. In general, vehicles with rear-wheel drive and rear-wheel drive are considered sporty, emotional, but also a bit unpredictable. Does that apply to these two? Also on the show: The sportiest mid-range sedan on the market. Of course with rear-wheel drive: The BMW 3 Series. Rear-wheel drive across vehicle classes – in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: In 1999, a new star in the roadster sky is expected to shake up the highly competitive market. The Honda S2000 comes to us as a pure athlete with rear-wheel drive and 240 hp from just 2.0 liters of displacement. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.sub-title: Recaro Tuning Event Show and Shine
programme.desc: Drifters, speed junkies and show stars the topics at tuning today: party without end at the Recaro tuning event. Show and shine, drift show and quarter-mile races. We are in. Mercedes E-Class brutal: The Brabus K 8 with 530 hp in the race track test. Full throttle action and lots of weird guys. The Speednation in Großenhain – a playground for petrol addicts! Speed ​​rush: on the move with more than 330 things on the Nardo high-speed oval. AND: Tuning without an expiration date: A four-seater Golf with turbo power makes you look elegant and timeless. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode of Stunt Heroes is all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch called Knobi. He drives over a ramp at 50 km/h and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other. The dangerous thing about the stunt: several gasoline barrels explode at the same time! If something goes wrong, Knobi is also in danger.... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​presenter Martin Utberg takes viewers to the Retro Classics Essen vintage car fair. On site he not only meets exhibitors, but also prominent guests from the classic car scene on the trade fair stage. They tell stories from times past - stories that you only hear when they come from those who have experienced them themselves. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Space meets overwhelming performance. Power sports station wagons are family cars with sports car DNA. The Audi RS6 has developed over decades from an inconspicuous family car into a technological masterpiece. But his competition should not be underestimated either. A look at the development history of sports suits shows how they rose to become the performance machines of today. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. We were exclusively at the world premiere of the Mercedes CLA in Rome and revealed all the details about design, technology and features. Also: Six exciting facts about the ultimate station wagon, the BMW M5 Touring! (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.sub-title: VW all-wheel drive on snow and ice
programme.desc: We're doing the ultimate winter test in the Arctic Circle! Three of the latest Volkswagen all-wheel drive vehicles, the Golf R, Tiguan and ID.4 GTX, compete against each other on snow and ice in Sweden. Which VW delivers the most driving fun, the best control and the wildest drifts? From classic combustion engines to electric precision, we show how each model masters the icy curves. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Practical, comfortable and highway-tested. These German everyday heroes bring home the shopping or are a hell of a lot of fun. At the Lausitzring we let the two most powerful VW Golfs compete against each other: GTI Clubsport versus R. Who does the job better? And the new VW Passat will be more comfortable and efficient. Will it get Volkswagen back on track? (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Cyclone
programme.desc: After a surprise cyclone hits the area, tourists become stranded on a boat in the sea, and they have to do anything in order to survive. To make matters even worse, they're joined by the survivors of a plane crash and a sinking boat.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Mill Of The Stone Women
programme.desc: In 19th century Holland, a professor of fine arts and an unlicensed surgeon run a secret lab where the professor's ill daughter receives blood-transfusions from kidnapped female victims who posthumously become macabre art.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: The Worm Eaters
programme.desc: A German hermit, who can talk with worms, seeks revenge on the town's mayor by putting mutant worms in everyone's meals and turning them into human worm slaves.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The program shows the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in practical testing.
